name: cardinal-gemini-plugin
description: Connect Gemini CLI to Cardinal telemetry and MCP with a browser-approved device-code flow.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Gemini CLI to Cardinal telemetry and MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Cardinal connects Gemini CLI to a Cardinal workspace through a device-code flow, configures the unified Cardinal MCP endpoint, and installs local Gemini CLI hooks that emit agent-session telemetry for Cardinal Outcomes.
